text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A trainer with no trainees has one job—getting to know new students.
choice_data_list: (All right, I'm gonna really study the racers today!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I get to the tracks, I spot Agnes Digital running the dirt course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's small, but she's sturdy and seems to have a lot of leg strength.
In the blink of an eye, she blasts down the final straight and crosses
the finish line.
choice_data_list:
(She looks experienced... I guess she's already
debuted, then.)

(She looks experienced... I guess she's already
debuted, then.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital, that was great! You were in top form, as always. At this
level, you're more than ready to take on the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwah?! The tryouts? Already?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But I, uh... That's kinda... Could I have more time to think about it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll, uh, I'll just scooch over to the turf course...

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text: Ah! If you insist. Don't push yourself too hard, though!

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
To think that she trains this hard every single day... and then turns
around and does it again on the other track. She's working twice as
hard as anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Agnes Digital sets off down the turf, I'm taken aback by how light
her steps are. I thought she was a dirt racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I whip out my stopwatch to check her time, and my jaw drops.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's good on turf and dirt, but she hasn't even run the tryouts yet, let alone debut?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My curiosity gets the better of me, and I head over to ask her
directly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fweheehee... Running on the same ground my oshis just stepped on is
so magical!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I can just follow their cleatprints, I'll be ready to follow them down
any track! Mwehehe, I'll follow them to the ends of the earth...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but I've gotta be careful not to stick out. I dunno what I would've
done if I accidentally agreed to enter the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I mean, I'd never forgive myself if I made such a rookie mistake...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: W-WAIT! Who just said that? You?!
choice_data_list: Me. We watched Daiwa Scarlet together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're that trainer who was simping as hard as I was. Looks like
we meet again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So how's everything going? Lady Luck rewarding your efforts?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been working hard to rack up good karma, y'know. Praying to my
merch shrine, giving thanks for my daily doses of moe, ugly crying
over idols...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
B-but more importantly! You didn't, uh, happen to overhear me
rambling, did you?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah... I see. I see how it is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, the reason I'm avoiding the tryouts is honestly pretty simple.
Just imagine your Umamusume oshis for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They specialize in either turf or dirt, right? But I don't really have a
specialty, and I have favs in both.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's the hardest part... I can't pick one without abandoning the
other. And I really, reeeeeally don't want that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The graded races at central racecourses are mostly for turf, especially
at higher levels.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lot of racers inevitably drift away from dirt, so I get what Agnes
Digital means.
choice_data_list: You're really passionate about racing, huh?
You're really passionate about racing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well, of course! I love watching both styles! I love turf Umas and dirt Umas! I love every single Umamusume ever to run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, um. It ain't easy bein' a fangirl, okay?! I've got way too many
favs to watch just one track type!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Duh! I thought you were as down bad as I am! I wanna watch both! I
have to, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I run turf, I won't be able to see dirt Umas up close! If I run dirt, I
won't get to see turf Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaahdk, how is that even fair?! I can't come up with a solution, so
I've been turning down all the scouts and tryout invites to stall for
time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna SIMP! Whether on turf or dirt, I wanna absorb the glory of
eeeeevery single Umamusume from the frontlines!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I can't help but feel like she's seeing things as a fan more than
a racer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But at least you get me! You feel my pain, right?! 'Cause you love
Umamusume too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I attempt to calm Agnes Digital down, then I take stock of the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to follow her favorite "oshi" Umamusume, but debuting as a
racer herself will limit what kind of races she can join.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't pick between dirt or turf, so she's been dodging the
question by rejecting scout offers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If I had a clear specialty, it'd be so much easier to accept the inevitable...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's already spent so long thinking herself in circles. Maybe what
she really needs is a second opinion.
choice_data_list: How about we ask some other racers for advice?
How about we ask some other racers for advice?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? We can't just...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I peek down at the course, where I spot the Overlord of turf racing,
T.M. Opera O, and the idol of dirt racing, Smart Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...What.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: WHAT?! That's the Overlord and the Umadol!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My, what fervent gazes. Are you perhaps here to see me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I welcome you both! I'm always happy to pose for photos, answer
questions, record interviews—anything for my adoring fans!
choice_data_list:
Well, we wanted to ask why you chose turf over
dirt.

Well, we wanted to ask why you chose turf over
dirt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's quite a unique question. The answer is simple, really. For
you see—I simply chose the stage best suited to complement my
glory!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I know you... You're Digital! Thank you for cheering me on at my
last performance!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm so flattered to see you here at the track! ♪ You must be a really
big fan!
choice_data_list:
She was hoping to ask why you chose dirt
racing.

She was hoping to ask why you chose dirt
racing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The reason I picked dirt over turf? Hmm... Well... I promised
myself that I'd be my best self and do what only I can! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though their phrasing differs, both answers are essentially the
same. They picked a style that would show off their talents best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now to apply that to Agnes Digital...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...As the grass follows the wind, so too does luck follows the virtuous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On that cryptic note, she passes out... Did I just witness someone
swoon in real life?
